'''Shen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] and a [[Dathomirian/Legends|Dathomirian]] [[Witches of Dathomir|witch]]. By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], she had an infant child and agreed to [[Battle of Dathomir (Hunt for Zsinj)|battle]] against [[Gethzerion]] and her [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]].<ref name="TCPL" />
